breaking.title: More than 1,200 hectares burnt! Firefighters battle southern France wildfires after deadly heatwave
breaking.summary: On Thursday, southern France faced intense wildfires that scorched more than 1,200 hectares, ignited by strong winds and dry conditions following a severe heatwave. The most significant blaze occurred in Aude, close to Spain, devouring 900 hectares. Firefighters, supported by water-bombing aircraft, fought bravely to control the situation, and thankfully, no casualties have been reported.

breaking.title: Mumbai man dies falling into manhole, third rain-related incident
breaking.summary: The man, identified as 55-year-old Aslam Esaf Shaikh, was taken to the Rajawadi Hospital in Ghatkopar, where the doctors declared him brought dead

breaking.title: 11-year-old boy driving pickup truck crashes into group of Thai monks, killing 9
breaking.summary: The boy is in custody and will be questioned when state child protection officers arrive, police said

breaking.title: 'Wrote about ending his life': Pilot who hit Beijing's tallest building suffered from anxiety
breaking.summary: A 66-year-old pilot named Liu faced a harrowing battle with anxiety and suicidal thoughts, culminating in a crash into the CITIC Group headquarters, the tallest building in Beijing. The aircraft, which took off after a routine flight, strayed off its intended path, resulting in injuries to 13 individuals. This alarming incident has ignited serious discussions about aviation security in a city known for its stringent controls.

breaking.title: Watch: BBC at site of deadly Russian attack on Kyiv flats
breaking.summary: Sarah Rainsford reports from the completely destroyed nine-storey block of flats in Ukraine's capital.

breaking.title: US pilot 'killed', plane torched in Papua; rebels call attack a 'message' to America & Indonesia
breaking.summary: Separatist rebels in Papua claim to have killed an American pilot and burned a civilian plane, alleging it ferried Indonesian military personnel. The West Papua National Liberation Army stated the attack was a message to the US and Indonesian governments. Authorities confirmed the aircraft was found burnt but could not immediately verify the rebels' claims or the pilot's death. This incident escalates the ongoing low-level insurgency in the region.

breaking.title: Man Attacks Wife With Axe After Dispute, Then Dies By Suicide In UP
breaking.summary: The couple is survived by a 19-year-old son and a nine-year-old daughter.

breaking.title: Hope To Find Survivors Fades As Venezuela Quake Death Count Nears 2,300
breaking.summary: Rescue workers search rubble in La Guaira, Venezuela, a week after twin earthquakes killed nearly 2,300.
